result:
## VERDICT: PASS

Review written to `story-verification/01-environment-state-and-visible-controls/sonnet-review.md`.

---

### Summary

**AC/TC Coverage:** All 5 ACs satisfied, all 17 TC conditions covered by passing tests.

**Gate:** `corepack pnpm run verify` passes clean — 9 Convex + 66 server service + 122 client service + 2 integration = 199 tests.

---

### Non-blocking warnings

| # | Severity | Finding |
|---|----------|---------|
| NW-1 | MINOR | `providerKind` nullable — documented deviation, justified (Story 2 fills it), contained |
| NW-2 | MINOR | `convex codegen` not run against live backend; expected in this test-tier shape |
| NW-3 | MINOR | One planned non-TC test ("control order stable on rerender") absent from `process-controls.test.ts` |
| TQF-1 | MINOR | TC-1.1k only asserts `rehydrate` disabled reason; doesn't verify `start`/`resume`/`rebuild` are also disabled |
| CG-1 | MINOR | `failed` + `environmentId === null` disables rehydrate in the implementation but this path is not tested |
| CG-4 | MINOR | Server bootstrap not explicitly tested for `lost` environment state (client layer covers it) |

### Invisible risk worth tracking

`convex/processEnvironmentStates.ts` has only a `query`, no mutations — correct for Story 1 read-only scope, but Stories 2–5 will need to add Convex mutations and keep `InMemoryPlatformStore` in sync with the real Convex shapes.
